query:
ALTER TABLE creditTransactions 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditSource ENUM('free', 'paid', 'subscription') DEFAULT 'paid' NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS balanceBefore INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS metadata JSON;
